result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly a blank primary header button, overlapping sticky UI elements, and very small/low-readability legal text near the bottom of the promotion.

issues.description: The yellow rounded button in the top-right header appears blank with no visible label or icon, making its purpose unclear.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible text label or icon, such as “Log In” or “Sign Up,” and ensure sufficient contrast against the yellow background.

issues.description: The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay overlaps the fine print/legal copy near the bottom of the promotional section, obscuring important content.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt higher, reduce its size, hide it once the user starts scrolling, or add more spacing so it does not cover text.

issues.description: The fine print/legal disclaimer is extremely small and difficult to read, especially on a mobile-sized screen.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size, improve line spacing, and ensure the text remains readable without zooming.

issues.description: The bottom sticky navigation sits very close to the promotional legal text, making the lower content feel cramped.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the page content so the sticky navigation does not visually crowd or risk covering important text.

issues.description: The top header contains several logos and elements packed tightly together, which makes the navigation area feel cluttered on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Simplify the header on mobile, reduce logo count/size, or move secondary branding into the menu.
